title: Simone: Woman of the Century
posterAlt: Simone: Woman of the Century (2022) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Simone Veil's life story through the pivotal events of Twentieth Century. Her childhood, her political battles, her tragedies. An intimate and epic portrait of an extraordinary woman who eminently challenged and transformed her era defending a humanist message still keenly relevant today.
synopsis: Released in 2022, Simone: Woman of the Century is a drama and history film from France. It carries a 6.8 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a 12 certification (BE rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
